# Security Policy

## Reporting a Vulnerability

Please report security vulnerabilities by opening a [GitHub Issue](https://github.com/websteris/pa-power-tool-bridge/issues).

For sensitive issues that should not be disclosed publicly, use GitHub's private vulnerability reporting:
**Security → Report a vulnerability** on the repository page.

## Scope

This repository contains the CLI Bridge installer and native messaging host for the Power Automate Power Tool extension. The bridge runs locally and communicates only with the browser extension via the native messaging protocol — it makes no outbound network connections.
